case_title: CHANG JUI LIU VS. ZHONG HONG QIU et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT QIU, ZHONG HONG

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, SEPARATE STATEMENT ; REQ FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE; EVIDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, CHANG JUI HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-10-2011 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, ZHONG HONG

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, CHANG JUI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QIU, ZHONG HONG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1431 IRVING STREET, GROUND FLOOR REAR ROOM, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CHANG JUI LIU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. NOT REPORTED.
